tweets.author: thebitcoinstrategy.bsky.social
tweets.text: The real Bitcoin wildcard is Strategy. Michael Saylor holds close to 850,000 BTC, nearly 5% of total liquid supply. His MNAV is down to 1.13. If it drops below 1, he can't buy with equity OR debt. That changes Bitcoin's demand picture fast.

tweets.author: thebitcoinstrategy.bsky.social
tweets.text: Ethereum could underperform Bitcoin by another 30% before hitting stable support. That is not a prediction. It is what the current momentum implies if nothing changes.
